languages.text: В тайной комнате Сектора Бионика Лорд-капитан отыскал{mf||а} записи одного из предков, Себериана, сгинувшего в Просторе Коронус вместе с могущественным артефактом. Из них он{mf||а} узнал{mf||а} код доступа к тайному разделу когитатора на Даргонусе.

In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica, the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.
languages.original_text: В тайной комнате Сектора Бионика Лорд-капитан отыскал{mf||а} записи одного из предков, Себериана, сгинувшего в Просторе Коронус вместе с могущественным артефактом. Из них он{mf||а} узнал{mf||а} код доступа к тайному разделу когитатора на Даргонусе.

traits.locale_text: In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.

In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.

In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica, the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.

In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica, the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.

languages.text: In der Geheimkammer des Sektors Bionica entdeckte der Lord Captain Aufzeichnungen seines Ahnherren Seberian, der mit einem mächtigen Artefakt in der Koronus-Ausdehnung verschwand. Besagte Aufzeichnungen enthielten den Zugangscode zu einem geheimen Bereich des Cogitators auf Dargonus.
languages.original_text: In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica, the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: In der Geheimkammer des Sektors Bionica entdeckte der Lord Captain Aufzeichnungen seines Ahnherren Seberian, der mit einem mächtigen Artefakt in der Koronus-Ausdehnung verschwand. Besagte Aufzeichnungen enthielten den Zugangscode zu einem geheimen Bereich des Cogitators auf Dargonus.

languages.text: Dans la pièce secrète du secteur Bionica, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a découvert les archives de son ancêtre, Seberian, qui a trouvé la mort dans les Étendues de Koronus alors qu'il était en possession d'une puissante relique. Ces documents ont révélé le code d'accès à une section confidentielle du cogitateur de Dargonus.
languages.original_text: In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica, the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: Dans la pièce secrète du secteur Bionica, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a découvert les archives de son ancêtre, Seberian, qui a trouvé la mort dans les Étendues de Koronus alors qu'il était en possession d'une puissante relique. Ces documents ont révélé le code d'accès à une section confidentielle du cogitateur de Dargonus.

languages.text: 在仿生区的密室里，舰长大人发现了先祖塞贝里安的记录，这位先祖当年与一件强大的圣物一同葬身于科罗努斯扩区。这些记录还给出了达戈努斯上一台沉思者加密区域的访问代码。
languages.original_text: In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica, the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: 在仿生区的密室里，舰长大人发现了先祖塞贝里安的记录，这位先祖当年与一件强大的圣物一同葬身于科罗努斯扩区。这些记录还给出了达戈努斯上一台沉思者加密区域的访问代码。

languages.text: En la cámara secreta del Sector Bionica, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán encontró registros de su antepasado, Seberian, que murió en la Extensión de Koronus llevando consigo un poderoso artefacto. Los registros también incluyen el código de acceso a una sección restringida de un cogitador en Dargonus.
languages.original_text: In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica, the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: En la cámara secreta del Sector Bionica, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán encontró registros de su antepasado, Seberian, que murió en la Extensión de Koronus llevando consigo un poderoso artefacto. Los registros también incluyen el código de acceso a una sección restringida de un cogitador en Dargonus.

languages.text: バイオニック・セクターの秘密の部屋で、ロード・キャプテンは先祖の一人であるセベリアンの記録を見つけた。そこからダーゴヌスのコギテーターの秘密区画へのアクセスコードを学んだ。
languages.original_text: In a secret room of the Bionic Sector, the Lord Captain found the records of one of his ancestors, Seberian, who had perished in the Coronus Expanse along with a powerful artefact. From them he learnt the access code to the secret section of the Cogitator on Dargonus.

languages.text: Lord Kaptan, Sektör Biyonika'nın gizli odasında güçlü bir eserle birlikte Koronus Enginliği'nde can veren atası Seberian'ın kayıtlarını buldu. Bu kayıtlar, Dargonus'taki kavramsayarın gizli bir bölümüne erişim kodunu ortaya çıkardı.
languages.original_text: In the secret chamber of the Sector Bionica, the Lord Captain found the records of {mf|his|her} ancestor, Seberian, who perished in the Koronus Expanse alongside a potent artefact. These records revealed the access code to a classified section of the cogitator on Dargonus.

traits.locale_text: Lord Kaptan, Sektör Biyonika'nın gizli odasında güçlü bir eserle birlikte Koronus Enginliği'nde can veren atası Seberian'ın kayıtlarını buldu. Bu kayıtlar, Dargonus'taki kavramsayarın gizli bir bölümüne erişim kodunu ortaya çıkardı.
